race.comment: TORI'S DEE (1) showed good early dash and raced on the speed last start before fading to finish 1.5 lengths back in fourth over 1100m at Moe. That was a stronger race than this and he should be at peak fitness now. AMERICAN RUSS (3) finished fourth over 1100m at Hamilton when resuming last start, beaten only 0.6 lengths. Has a fair record when second up, including three top-three finishes. Nicely placed to find winning form. FACTUALLY (7) showed early speed from an outside draw and held a forward position before fading to finish fifth, beaten 2.25 lengths, last start over 1000m at Donald. Had been racing consistently before that, so warrants another chance. SPINHOF (6) has been around the mark in 56 grade of late, so he'll relish competing against these rivals. Just needs luck from the gate. GOPHER FRANK (2) has been beaten similar margins at two runs for the new stable and looks ready to peak.
